Operation 'updateHousekeepingStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too brief and lacks critical details. Enhanced version specifies: what inputs are expected (room identifiers and status values), what the operation returns (confirmation), and important side effects (room availability impact). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Update the housekeeping status for rooms.
data.description_suggestion: Updates the housekeeping status for one or more rooms in the property. Accepts room identifiers and status values (e.g., clean, dirty, inspected, out-of-order) via the HousekeepingRequest schema. Returns confirmation of status updates applied. This operation synchronizes room cleanliness state with the PMS and affects room availability for new bookings.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks critical details. Enhanced version specifies: what inputs are expected (room identifiers and status values), what the operation returns (confirmation), and important side effects (room availability impact). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Manage guest database records and profiles.
data.summary_suggestion: Create, retrieve, or update guest profiles
data.description_suggestion: Manages guest database records and profiles through create, read, update, or delete operations specified in the GuestDatabaseRequest. Accepts guest information including contact details, preferences, and history. Returns the affected guest record(s) or confirmation of operation completion. Supports bulk operations for multiple guest records. Changes are immediately reflected in the guest database and available for future bookings and communications.

message: Operation 'voucherOperations' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, unclear_purpose. data.current_description: Manage voucher and gift card operations.
data.summary_suggestion: Create, validate, or redeem vouchers and gift cards
data.description_suggestion: Manages voucher and gift card operations including creation, validation, redemption, and balance tracking via the VoucherRequest schema. Accepts voucher details such as code, denomination, expiration date, and redemption terms. Returns voucher status, remaining balance, or confirmation of transaction. Supports bulk voucher generation and tracks redemption history. Changes to voucher status and balances are immediately reflected in the system and affect guest account credits.

message: Operation 'postingOperations' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.current_description: Post charges and transactions to guest accounts.
data.description_suggestion: Posts charges, credits, and transactions to guest accounts via the PostingRequest schema. Accepts transaction details including guest identifier, amount, transaction type (charge/credit), description, and optional reference codes. Returns the posted transaction record with confirmation number and updated account balance. Transactions are immediately applied to the guest folio and affect the outstanding balance due. Supports batch posting of multiple transactions and generates audit trail entries for compliance.
data.reasoning: Original description is incomplete for AI agent usage. message: Operation 'pmsConnectivity' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what inputs are required (Request_Type parameter) and what outputs are returned. Enhanced version specifies the parameter-driven nature of the operation, lists key operation types with their purposes, and clarifies the response structure for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Perform various PMS connectivity operations including room info, rates, inventory management. The Request_Type parameter determines the operation. Supports: RoomInfo, RateInfo, InventoryUpdate, RateUpdate, ReservationList, and more.
data.summary_suggestion: Execute PMS connectivity operations by request type
data.description_suggestion: Performs PMS connectivity operations for rates, inventory, and reservations management. The Request_Type parameter in PmsConnectivityRequest determines the specific operation: RoomInfo retrieves room details, RateInfo retrieves rate information, InventoryUpdate updates room inventory, RateUpdate updates rates, ReservationList retrieves reservations, and additional operation types are supported. Returns operation-specific data in the PmsConnectivityResponse object.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what inputs are required (Request_Type parameter) and what outputs are returned. Enhanced version specifies the parameter-driven nature of the operation, lists key operation types with their purposes, and clarifies the response structure for better AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Hotel listing and meta search operations
data.current_description: Retrieve hotel information, amenities, room types, salutations, countries, extra charges, and more. The request_type parameter determines the operation: HotelList, HotelAmenity, RoomTypeList, ConfiguredDetails, CalculateExtraCharge, RoomList, ExtraCharges, BookingList, ReadBooking, etc.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve hotel and booking data by request type
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves hotel listing and meta search data for external applications. The request_type query parameter determines the specific operation: HotelList returns available hotels, HotelAmenity returns hotel amenities, RoomTypeList returns room types, ConfiguredDetails returns property configuration, CalculateExtraCharge calculates additional charges, RoomList returns room inventory, ExtraCharges returns charge definitions, BookingList returns bookings, ReadBooking retrieves specific booking details, and additional operation types are supported. Returns ListingResponse containing operation-specific data. Requires API key authentication via query parameter.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate the parameter-driven nature. Description lists operations but lacks clarity about inputs (request_type parameter, API key requirement) and outputs (ListingResponse structure). Enhanced version clarifies the parameter-driven architecture, explains key operation types with their purposes, specifies the response structure, and includes authentication requirements for better AI agent interpretability.
